name: SimpleSweep
description: Step 12.0 baseline — mirror variant. Every available bot pilots the SAME deck (bulwark-control) so any win-rate spread is attributable to pilot skill, not deck choice. bulwark-control is chosen because it's the closer-less deck surfaced by 12.0's first run; if any bot can make it win, that's a meaningful result. Includes self-mirrors so we see per-bot seed variance. Pairs with the canonical PairCorrectly run to separate deck signal from bot signal in 12.0's baseline artifacts.
